name: precedence: Eric replying '2' with NO pending guest expectation still resolves as cleaner room-naming (B11.5, unchanged path)
comment: The other direction, and mutation target #2. Eric is a registered cleaner with a guest Session State of NEW — no pending numbered menu. Replying '2' with Room 02 in Cleaning correctly resolves as cleaner input (marks Room 02 clean), exactly as before B11.5. This proves the precedence fix is targeted: it declines to preempt only when there IS a competing guest expectation, and leaves genuine cleaner room-naming untouched.
